title: Vacancy for Teacher at NIT Trichy

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at NIT Trichy
jsonLd.description:
NIT Trichy, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Aurangabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About NIT Trichy:
NIT Trichy is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIT Trichy!
